parameters.url: ={{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.apiUrl }}/api/v1/accounts/{{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.accountId }}/conversations/{{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.conversationId }}/messages
parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "content": "Great! Here are available times for a discovery call:

" + Object.entries($json.data.slots).flatMap(([date, times], dayIdx) => times.map((slot, idx) => (dayIdx * 10 + idx + 1) + ") " + new Date(slot.time).toLocaleString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric", hour: "numeric", minute: "2-digit", timeZone: "UTC" }))).join("
") + "

Please reply with the number of your preferred time.", "message_type": "outgoing", "private": false } }}

={{ { "start": JSON.parse($("Qualify & Detect Intent").item.json.output).slot, "eventTypeId": <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Your Cal.com Event Type ID__>, "attendee": { "name": $("Format for LLM").item.json.contactName, "email": $("Format for LLM").item.json.contactEmail, "timeZone": "UTC" } } }}

parameters.url: ={{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.apiUrl }}/api/v1/accounts/{{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.accountId }}/conversations/{{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.conversationId }}/messages
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "content": "Perfect! Your discovery call is confirmed for " + new Date($json.start).toLocaleString("en-US", { weekday: "long", month: "long", day: "numeric", hour: "numeric", minute: "2-digit", timeZone: "UTC" }) + ". You'll receive a calendar invite at " + $("Format for LLM").item.json.contactEmail + ". A team member will join you shortly to discuss further!", "message_type": "outgoing", "private": false } }}

parameters.url: ={{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.apiUrl }}/api/v1/accounts/{{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.accountId }}/conversations/{{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.conversationId }}
={{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.apiUrl }}/api/v1/accounts/{{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.accountId }}/conversations/{{ $("Format for LLM").item.json.conversationId }}/messages
